programme.title: Jamie: Fast and Simple (S1)
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a trusty midweek traybake of roast veg and Camembert. He turns poached chicken into a creamy chicken & chive pie, serves up his easy green chilli salsa under sizzling butterflied prawns, and finishes it all off with decadent chocolate tiramisù.

programme.title: Maldives
programme.desc: In this episode, we get special access to Gili Lankanfushi resort in the Maldives, the ultimate romantic getaway and one of the most exclusive hotels in the world, where stays cost as much as £25000 per night.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: Lucy has just escaped an abusive relationship when she meets the kind Frank, but when she discovers that Frank is stalking her, she decides she's had enough of abusive men and turns the tables on Frank.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2: Simone's Revenge
programme.desc: After escaping the murderous clutches of Simone, Monica is making a fresh start as the host of a primetime TV program. Simone, suffering from amnesia, sees Monica on TV, her memories come rushing back.

programme.title: Lomo Saltado with Pork and Sweet Potatoes
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece puts a Southern twist on the classic Peruvian dish lomo saltado by using pork and adding sweet potato fries.

programme.title: Lamb Meatballs with Herby Couscous & Cardamom Snickerdoodles
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.title: Beet Risotto And Arancini Balls
programme.desc: To celebrate her wedding anniversary, Rachael prepares her famous beet risotto, made with roasted beets, red wine, onions, ricotta salata and more.

programme.title: Chrissie and Jamie
programme.desc: Chrissie and Jamie have an active outdoor lifestyle. They want a home where they can just wake up and jump in the water for a swim, and the home must be a place their three adult sons will want to visit.

programme.title: Bites of Fantasy
programme.desc: Dining out takes flight into the world of fantasy when host Michael Yo shows us that make-believe experiences can be really tasty. First stop is a restaurant in New York City's Financial District.
Today, we'll introduce you to popular "no-interior" homes. We'll showcase the "Self-Made 3 No House," where unnecessary elements are completely removed, and the "Hide-and-Seek House".

programme.title: The Neighbor Who Saw Too Much
programme.desc: A grounded teen becomes convinced that her hot new neighbour is actually a dangerous killer. When no-one else believes her, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Dallas: Stillwater

programme.title: Country Captain Chicken Stew

programme.title: Everything Bagel Galette & Upside Down Banana Bread
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Hawaiian Style Sloppy Joes

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: Wolong Panda Reserve, China
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit a nature reserve in China. But who's taking all the pandas' bamboo?

programme.title: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: While working on the Chinese railway, Thomas misses his friend Percy, and takes a trip down the memory lane.

programme.title: Toy Tidy
programme.desc: Duck has been leaving his toys everywhere, so Sarah helps him tidy his bedroom.

programme.title: Duck's Quack
programme.desc: Sarah suggests visiting the spare sounds section of the Big Shop when Duck loses his quack.

programme.title: Bus-Train
programme.desc: Cynthia is working on the bus so asks Stanley to take her passengers to the community centre. He uses Amare's tractor and trailer, his car, a boat, and a bath to make a Bus-Train.

programme.title: Leaves
programme.desc: There are leaves all over the place, Stanley tries to gather them up in his van with his leaf blower, but it is harder than he thought and fills Myrtle's house with them instead.

programme.title: I Can Make a Dolphin Noise
programme.desc: Back stroke and doggy paddle, flips, and roly-polys. The animals talk about all the fun stuff when swimming.

programme.title: It's Time to Watch a Family Film
programme.desc: JoJo finds something old in the cupboard - it's a video tape. Time for a Gran Gran plan to see what's on it. Soon, they are off to the library to find out if Terrence can help.

programme.title: Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Show and Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: The Playing Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins, come to visit.

programme.title: The Singing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out on a walk in the countryside. Its been a long walk and the squirrels are starting to get tired, but it's a long way back. Don't worry, Duggee has his singing badge.

programme.title: Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Solar Race: Australia
programme.desc: Glitch hopes to win a solar-powered race across the Australian outback.

programme.title: Leek
programme.desc: Leek won't let the conditions backstage stop him from singing "Can't Hold Me Down".

programme.title: Okra
programme.desc: It's the spectacular music duo, Okra, playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.

programme.title: Da Veggie Code
programme.desc: Supertato's Tato belt gets locked inside a glass case for an exhibition, but Tomato can't remember the code to get it out again, and Supertato needs it back to defeat Evil Pea.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Supertato and Carrot are looking for ice and think Evil Pea has become kind by giving them some. They soon realise it's not Evil Pea after all.

programme.title: Listen
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po take it in turns to listen to music through a pair of headphones. The Teletubbies love dancing to the music they hear.

programme.title: Gloves
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'gloves' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different types of gloves - green gloves, woolly gloves, fingerless gloves and glowing gloves!

programme.title: Musical Statues
programme.desc: Messy gets pins and needles and causes chaos at the OKIDO musical statues competition.

programme.title: Mojo Rocks
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Slide
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Chinese New Year, Dragon Dance Drama
programme.desc: Kyan's invited to perform a dragon dance for Chinese New Year in Beijing. Glitch decides to build a fire breathing dragon robot for the parade and The Go Jetters need to stop it!

programme.title: Mount Mumandad
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey have five minutes to bed, just enough time to race to the summit of Mount Mumandad. But for them, facing powerful storms, avalanches and stinky spots will take teamwork.

programme.title: Dunny
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Andy and the Baby Lar Gibbons
programme.desc: Andy encounters some baby Lar Gibbons in Thailand that appear to be flying as they swing through the rainforest.

programme.title: Tubes
programme.desc: Bella and Lift enjoy making funny honk noises with tubes. They visit Tincy the Spider, who uses terrific tubes to make music with the Playtimers.

programme.title: The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: The River Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: The Making Friends Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: The Boreal Forest, Canada
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: First Day on Sodor!
programme.desc: Darcy the tunnel boring machine makes some mistakes on her first day, but she soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.title: Plate Escape
programme.desc: Sarah, Duck and Plate Girl find some unusual inhabitants in the Plant Section at the shop.

programme.title: Rainbow's Niece
programme.desc: Sarah's new colour wheel reminds Rainbow that he has not seen his niece in a while.

programme.title: Bell
programme.desc: The Town Hall clock is broken, it's lost its Ding Dong. It will take hours to fix, so Stanley asks noisy Fred if he will shout "DING DONG" when the big hand is pointing up.

programme.title: Bus-Train
programme.desc: Cynthia is working on the bus so asks Stanley to take her passengers to the community centre. He uses Amare's tractor and trailer, his car, a boat, and a bath to make a Bus-Train.

programme.title: Sometimes I Make Cakes
programme.desc: Flipping pancakes, baking cakes, and homemade sauce from the shops, the animals share all the things they love about cooking.

programme.title: The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: The Waiting Badge

programme.title: I'm Hungry

programme.title: Mount Mumandad
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey have five minutes to bed, just enough time to race to the summit of Mount Mumandad. But for them, facing powerful storms, avalanches and stinky spots will take teamwork.

programme.title: Dunny
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: Sheep Dog

programme.title: Housework

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former champions Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (38-1, 27 KOs) and 'El Asesino' Kermit Cintron (32-2, 28 KOs) in a middleweight battle. The fight took place at the Home Depot Center in Carson, California, USA, on May 8, 2010.

programme.title: Budapest 2023 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Darren Barker
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a middleweight title fight between champion Sergio Martinez and up-and-coming European middleweight Darren Baker that ends with a right hook blast. Also on the card, action from 5-time champion Timothy Bradley.

programme.title: Fukuoka, Japan: Show 1
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Takakeisho, Hakuho, Hokutofuji and Tamawashi from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: In Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
programme.desc: Episode 8: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu and the Martial Art of Grappling with Masters Renato Barreto and Breno Sivak.

programme.title: FS MMA Tom Breese vs. Bartosz Lesko
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 80 in Lubin, Poland, with the co-main event, as top U.K. middleweight Tom Breese takes on Poland's Bartosz Lesko. Breese, the former UFC fighter, has been involved in two controversial finishes so far in KSW and is looking to start fresh again and climb towards the title while Lesko is aiming to score the biggest win of his career and makes a splash in his KSW middleweight debut.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Victor Ortiz
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features The Ring Magazine's 2011 Fight of The Year from the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA. Undefeated welterweight world champion Andre Berto (27-0, 21 KOs) puts his title on the line against 'Vicious' Victor Ortiz (28-2, 22 KOs) in a fight that restores your passion in the sport of boxing.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Timothy Bradley vs. Luis Carlos Abregu
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a bout between 2 undefeated fighters, Timothy 'Desert Storm' Bradley (25-0, 11 KOs) vs. Luis Carlos Abregu, aka 'El Potro' (29-0, 23 KOs) from the Agua Caliente Casino, Rancho Mirage in California, USA on July 17, 2010.

programme.title: Budapest World Championship
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this special one hour episode, we see the best of the World Judo Championships from Budapest where everyone in the world swarms to witness the crowning of 14 world champions. Also, world renowned fighter Teddy Riner experiences his hardest title defense in his career.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Ryan Rhodes
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Saul (Canelo) Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, taking on challenger Ryan Rhodes. The bout ends in the final round after a series of unanswered blows. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: Fukuoka, Japan: Show 2
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Takakeisho, Mitakeumi, Shohozan and Meisei from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Boy's CMX Form and Weapons
programme.desc: Featuring Boy's CMX Form and Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney World, Orlando, FL.

programme.title: Chael Sonnen, Matt Serra, Clay Guida and more!
programme.desc: This episode follows former UFC welterweight champion Matt Serra around his hometown in New Jersey for a look at the lighter side of this intense competitor. Ring girl Natasha Wicks shows us that the fighters aren't the only ones with the big guns. Plus a behind the scenes look at the UFC Fan Expo and an interview with MMA legend Chael Sonnen.

programme.title: 新闻今日谈 (21/4/26)
programme.desc: 此节目针对每天最热门的时事话题，在观众最关注的时刻即时作出评论，让观众更洞悉事件的真相。

programme.title: 凤凰聚焦
programme.desc: 《凤凰聚焦》锁定全球和本地重大的时政话题、社会事件及新闻热点，选题超越地域界限，原创性挖掘事件的背景与真相，配以记者的现场调查，梳理来龙去脉，以高清的新闻镜片，摸清看透热点大事，充份展现凤凰团队深挖时事议题的功力。

programme.desc: 立足香港国际金融中心，跟踪每日资本市场动态，聚焦热门政经事件，汇总境内外媒体多元财经观点，第一时间邀请政府官员、顶尖学者、投行分析师等权威嘉宾全方位解读重大财经政策，为观众创造多面向丰富视角。

programme.title: 总编辑时间 (22/4/26)
programme.desc: 由凤凰卫视资深评论员重点编选和剖析一天世界最值得注意的头条新闻，解构事情的来龙去脉和对日后发展的重要性，让观众可以深度了解一天的重点事项。

programme.title: 凤凰大视野
programme.desc: 凤凰卫视力求创新，不为人后，推出凤凰大视野一系列主题性纪录片节目，每周连续播出某一专题，或是社会焦点、或是历史纪念日、或特别行动、独家内幕透析时代局势，一气呵成五集持续播出。

programme.title: 军情观察室
programme.desc: 本节目分析当今世界的最新军情动态，经典战例，新锐兵器知识，又会走进野战实地，电玩战争，用军事发烧友的目光看海陆空世界。

programme.title: 时事直通车 (22/4/26)
programme.desc: 在亚、欧、美三大洲拥有直播站和全球完善报导网络，又有众多驻外记者和阵容鼎盛的主播，收看凤凰卫视便俨如坐上一列资讯直通车。直通车为您送上当日各地头条要闻。

programme.title: 凤凰聚焦
programme.desc: 《凤凰聚焦》锁定全球和本地重大的时政话题、社会事件及新闻热点，选题超越地域界限，原创性挖掘事件的背景与真相，配以记者的现场调查，梳理来龙去脉，以高清的新闻镜片，摸清看透热点大事，充份展现凤凰团队深挖时事议题的功力。

programme.title: 凤凰全球连线 (22/4/26)
programme.desc: 《凤凰全球连线》为你带来世界各地的热点新闻，并深入探讨事件始末因由，分析事情的重要性。主持人会于直播时段，通过卫星、电话与全球各地的凤凰卫视记者、特约记者、评论员连线，向你汇报当天要闻。

programme.title: San Quentin Breakout
programme.desc: A lifelong escape artist, Forrest Tucker, ends up in San Quentin prison. But despite his advanced age, he manages to engineer one of the most audacious prison breaks of all time.

programme.title: National Treasures
programme.desc: From a bat swung by one of baseball's boldest pioneers to an iconic painting hidden behind a false wall, these finds prove that America's greatest treasures can turn up in the most unlikely places.

programme.title: The Deadly Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: For centuries, this 500,000-square-mile area of the Atlantic has been the most notorious stretch of ocean on Earth. It's a place where ships, planes, and unsuspecting travellers have been lost.

programme.desc: Bill and Tes battle The Everglades heat. Troy and Pickle search for a python paradise. A special day for Dusty goes awry while Zak and Bruce try their luck in The Dead Zone.

programme.desc: For millennia, plagues, curses, and the violent destruction of cities have been blamed on the wrath of gods. But were these divine punishments mere myth, or is there proof they are based on real events?

programme.title: The Hunt Begins
programme.desc: Third-generation shipwreck hunter Jeff MacKinnon searches the deadly Death Coast for Le Chameau, an 18th-century shipwreck carrying a fortune in rare coins.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: The Swamp is like never before, and the hunters are fighting back with radical new strategies. King of the Swamp Troy Landry attempts a gruelling double shift, running lines both morning and evening.

programme.title: Running Down A Dream
programme.desc: Lauro begins the 1,000-mile Iditarod with his sixteen-dog team, pitted against harsh conditions and rugged terrain in one of the toughest races on earth. Bret and Ivy ascend into the Alaska Range.

programme.title: A Bead On The Target
programme.desc: While the team continues to hunt down the legendary Chappell Vault in the Money Pit, new structures are uncovered in the mysterious swamp that strengthen a developing theory.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The team unveils the greatest mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle: its most perplexing vanished ships and planes, and the strange and powerful forces said to be behind the Triangle's deadly reputation.

programme.title: Untethered
programme.desc: Paul prepares his haul of winter fur for market and explores a new piece of land to call his own. Eustace builds a boat lift using massive logs and a block and tackle pulley.

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: GURIH CINTA TELUR ASIN
programme.desc: Varrel (Dimaz Andrean) has been traumatized by salted eggs since childhood. After accidentally injuring Babeh Jali and ruining his daughter Kinara's (Yuki Kato) salted egg stock, Varrel is forced into a unique punishment: he must work for Kinara to learn the art-and the value-of the very food he fears the most.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mas Mawar Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Tama (El Ryan) is a rose seller who had to drop out of medical school after his parents went bankrupt. His life changes when he rescues Sheina (Indah Nicole), a doctor and girlfriend of a famous celebrity, after she suffers from amnesia following a tragic accident. As Tama cares for her, a beautiful bond begins to form between the fallen student and the forgotten doctor

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: LOE YANG LUV GUA YANG KEDER
programme.desc: Zeno’s (25) life shatters when he discovers that Masha, the woman he loves, is cheating on him with his own cousin, Panca. To make matters worse, Zeno learns that Panca is plotting to overthrow Zeno's father from his successful oil company to seize the director's chair for himself.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Neng Takoyaki Senyumnya Kok Gak Ada Di Menu
programme.desc: Bastian’s (Indra Evans) wedding comes to a screeching halt when Sita (Ina Marika), a humble takoyaki vendor, crashes the ceremony claiming to be his pregnant girlfriend. In reality, Sita was hired by Bastian himself to create a scandal and escape a marriage he never wanted.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Keluarga Sebenernya Udah Tau Tapi Dia Belum Mau
programme.desc: Bagus (Mahdy Reza) is the son of a traditional dance studio owner, but he works under an ambitious boss named Nova. Bagus often finds himself turning to Nova whenever he faces financial struggles. However, his heart actually belongs to Risa, a beautiful girl who has just enrolled in his family's dance classes

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: BUNGA CINTA BERSEMI DI BENGKEL
programme.desc: When Fery’s (Hardy Fadillah) delivery van breaks down, he ends up in a heated argument with a female mechanic named Nabila (Naomi Zaskia). Their parents, who are old friends, notice that their children's personalities don't match traditional gender roles. To 'fix' them, they agree to a swap: Nabila must work at Fery’s flower shop, while Fery must get his hands dirty at Nabila’s garage.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Kasih Paham Bang Ilmu Bangun Rumah Tangga
programme.desc: After her sister’s passing, Jeny (Nabila Zavira) is forced to marry her brother-in-law, Ivan (Cemal Faruk). The two can't stand each other, but their families are determined to make it work, pushing them into a honeymoon and demanding they produce an heir as soon as possible.

After accidentally injuring Babeh Jali and ruining his daughter Kinara's (Yuki Kato) salted egg stock, Varrel is forced into a unique punishment: he must work for Kinara to learn the art-and the value-of the very food he fears the most.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mas Mawar Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Tama (El Ryan) is a rose seller who had to drop out of medical school after his parents went bankrupt. His life changes when he rescues Sheina (Indah Nicole), a doctor and girlfriend of a famous celebrity, after she suffers from amnesia following a tragic accident. As Tama cares for her, a beautiful bond begins to form between the fallen student and the forgotten doctor

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: LOE YANG LUV GUA YANG KEDER
programme.desc: Zeno’s (25) life shatters when he discovers that Masha, the woman he loves, is cheating on him with his own cousin, Panca. To make matters worse, Zeno learns that Panca is plotting to overthrow Zeno's father from his successful oil company to seize the director's chair for himself.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TOLONG PERMAK HATIKU
programme.desc: A traveling seamstress specializing in clothing alterations meets a handsome man during a roadside incident. Though sparks fly instantly, their romance faces a major obstacle: the man is already committed to someone else.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Halumu dan Haluku Jadi Halufyu
programme.desc: Alya’s (Callista Arum) car is blocked by Thoriq’s (Kevin Hillers) wonton cart. While looking for her boyfriend, Ozi, Alya discovers a painful truth: Ozi has been dating another woman named Hana for three years. After a public breakup at Thoriq’s stall, Alya and Thoriq grow closer, sparking a jealous rage in Hana.

But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Inside the Miami Grand Prix
programme.desc: Miami Grand Prix Managing Partner Tom Garfinkel tackles the complexities of putting on the race, and F1 CEO Stefano Domenicali reveals why it's key to F1's future growth.

programme.title: North Korea's Hidden Remote IT Scheme
programme.desc: This is the story of how an Arizona woman's house became a gateway for North Korea's IT operatives - an underground "laptop farm" that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: South Korea
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits South Korea to explore how it became a cultural and tech superpower. She trains with a Taekwondo blackbelt, learns kimchi secrets from a grandmaster and dives into pro gaming.

programme.title: Vietnam's Rise as a Modern Success Story
programme.desc: Hannah explores Vietnam. From the vibrancy of Ho Chi Minh City to a muddy prawn harvest in the Mekong Delta and the misty hilltops of Sapa, she reveals a nation embracing change.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: Why a Lunar Ecosystem Could Be Worth Billions
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Can Living Human Brain Cells Power AI?
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: Corruption as Cancer
programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍将王家私人飞机坠毁的消息压下；王家三女王启澄与其丈夫彭建邦，暗通进涛的死敌柯永成，要令明塱医院停摆。以珈与丽雪质问下，一妍终讲出所知；一妍答应让两人到当地参与搜救，她则留港善后，但一切要保密……一妍安排专机让坠机生还者进涛回港就医，越洋吩咐副院长林英杰紧急安排，同时暗中跟记者交易……

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 白露去见七海伶，得知七海伶等人计划刺杀彧修明。同时，白露被任命为负责星瀚大典的事宜，并举荐顾惘然协助。另一方面，界诸婴在父亲界海天的遗书劝导下，放下仇恨。蔡骖和樊如晦等人则密谋利用七海伶刺杀彧修明，计划夺位。白露在调查彧修明的秘密时，被发现但她成功以仰慕彧修明为借口掩饰过去，并借到书带回研究，发现真师的记载，开始怀疑彧修明与真师有关。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.desc: 桂婵以商人身份接近日军，其实是为了取得特权，以救助更多难民逃离战火。战事恶化，桂婵被义士接至香港，与十七重逢，两人互表心意，但桂婵的记忆力已越来越差……日本开始攻打香港，花香在逃难中早产诞子，留产所其后却被炸毁。桂婵意外听到孩子下落，独自追寻线索，却忘记回家的路，与十七失散。

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Julia Roberts and Mel Gibson team up for the first time in this taut thriller of a beautiful Justice Department attorney entangled in a paranoid cab driver's Conspiracy Theory.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Julia Roberts and Hugh Grant star in this delightful romantic comedy about a world-famous movie star who falls in love with a bookstore owner while the whole world watches.

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: A rising star quarterback suffers a potentially career-ending brain trauma after an attack by an unhinged fan.

programme.title: Heart Eyes
programme.desc: When the 'Heart Eyes Killer' strikes, a pair of co-workers are mistaken for a couple by the elusive couple-hunting killer.

programme.title: Sully
programme.desc: Tom Hanks stars as Captain Chesley 'Sully' Sullenberger, who landed his disabled plane on the Hudson River, saving the lives of all on board.

programme.title: Agent Recon
programme.desc: Jim Yung and marines are sent to a base and encounter mind-controlled warriors led by a powerful being that threatens humanity's survival.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love
programme.desc: A straight-laced man tries to play the field, but discovers that his heart will always be with his wife.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: Graduated from college and realizing it takes more than just a cappella to get by, the Bellas return to make music together one last time.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: This star-packed extravaganza brings the comic book legend to the big screen where an infant superhero is sent to Earth just as his home planet, Krypton, explodes.

programme.title: Superman Ii
programme.desc: The cosmic battle for world supremacy begins as Superman inadvertently releases three powerful exiled Kyrptonians and must stop them at all cost!

programme.title: Must Love Dogs
programme.desc: A lady sets out to change her single status by putting up a personal ad but realises she has too much to handle when men respond to the ad.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a dangerous crime wave hits the beach, the squad of lifeguards go on a mission to prove that you don’t have to wear a badge to save the bay.

programme.title: The Audacity Of Nope

programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, Andre and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls with disastrous results.

programme.desc: Bacon becomes the West Packer High football mascot, but when the school's rival steals him as part of a prank, Lay Lay will stop at nothing to get her beloved pig back.

programme.title: Along Came a Sister / Chore and Peace
programme.desc: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes' tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

programme.title: For Bros About to Rock / It's a Loud, Loud, Loud, Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever. // Lincoln finds a letter in the attic leading him to believe there is money hidden within the Loud house!

programme.title: Sammy Suckerfish / Big League Bob
programme.desc: SpongeBob meets a magical fish. // SpongeBob cooks in the big leagues.

programme.title: The Patrick Show Cashes In / The Star Games
programme.desc: In this ad-packed variety episode, The Patrick Show sells merchandise in order to fund its second season. // Patrick forces his entire family to participate in a series of different game show challenges.

programme.title: Bunny the Barbarian
programme.desc: Bunny goes on a mid-day adventure to a forgotten age.

programme.title: Bummer Camp / Sleepstakes
programme.desc: When Gramps struggles to run Camp Mastadon, the kids come to his rescue. //The Loud kids help Lana get over her fear of sleepovers.

programme.title: J-LAD / Big Honey
programme.desc: LAD has a sleepover and in an effort to join in, Jack ends up making a promise that turns their night upside down. // When Will's parents visit Canyon Valley, news of the sale of their bee farm sends the family into a big, honey-inheritance spiral.

programme.title: The Real Woori World / The Collector
programme.desc: Min tries to avoid the usual Woori World chaos, but when the family splits up they all get lost in their own fiascos. // Jack's mission to find the rare DVD sequel of his favorite movie leads him to the mysterious Collector.

programme.title: Patrick! The Game / The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new board game, and invites SpongeBob, Sandy and Squidward to play it with him. // After accidentally flushing Mr. Krabs' safe, SpongeBob and Squidward must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: Tales of Woe
programme.desc: When Stella's music box disappears at school, the gang immediately suspects the Rat Beast, a student urban legend.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: In this intense revenge chronicle, two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: The First Night With the Duke
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary college girl finds herself reincarnated as a background extra in a romance novel, only to spend a night with the story's most dangerously obsessive male lead. A romantic fantasy with no brakes begins!

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A perfectionist architect and a cheerful AI developer clash over a business takeover. As their lives intertwine, they navigate family rivalries and corporate stakes to find unexpected comfort and love.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.title: Neeya Naana
programme.desc: A talk show with a difference - every week a topic is chosen and two groups of people representing extreme ends talk about their views.

programme.title: Dhanam - Ungalil Oruthi
programme.desc: A debt-ridden man's attempt to report smugglers for a reward backfires, leading to a dangerous pursuit as the criminals seek revenge on him.

programme.title: Kanmani Anbudan
programme.desc: Kanmani, a talented chef, falls for Anbu, heir to Raj Foods, while her actress friend Vennila also catches his eye. After an unexpected marriage, will Anbu accept Kanmani as his wife?

programme.title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
programme.desc: Ilamathi is stuck between a brave cop and a bad goon. This love triangle is dangerous. Can her heart handle the trouble? She must choose between the two men.

programme.title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare - Oru Chinanjiru Kuyilin Kadhai

programme.title: Mannat Harr Khushi Paane Ki
programme.desc: Gifted chef Mannat strives for success, unaware her ruthless boss, Aishwarya, is her estranged birth mother, creating a complex and emotional workplace dynamic.

programme.title: Mahadev & Sons
programme.desc: Mahadev is a man of principles, leading a strict household as the family head! But bound to fly high, his children rebel, and a generational clash ensues!

programme.title: Seher Hone Ko Hai
programme.desc: Seher, a young girl in Lucknow, is determined to become a doctor. Her mother, Kausar, supports her dream, while her father's plans for marriage spark conflict.

programme.title: Noyontara
programme.desc: Noyontara talks to ghosts and is mocked for it. Her world flips after marrying Surjo, a man who trusts only science, leading to spooky twists and emotional surprises.

programme.desc: Mangal embarks on a quest to find Lakshmi the perfect husband, showcasing the enduring strength of sisterhood, love, trials, and the power of destiny.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍将王家私人飞机坠毁的消息压下；王家三女王启澄与其丈夫彭建邦，暗通进涛的死敌柯永成，要令明塱医院停摆。以珈与丽雪质问下，一妍终讲出所知；一妍答应让两人到当地参与搜救，她则留港善后，但一切要保密……一妍安排专机让坠机生还者进涛回港就医，越洋吩咐副院长林英杰紧急安排，同时暗中跟记者交易……

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 白露去见七海伶，得知七海伶等人计划刺杀彧修明。同时，白露被任命为负责星瀚大典的事宜，并举荐顾惘然协助。另一方面，界诸婴在父亲界海天的遗书劝导下，放下仇恨。蔡骖和樊如晦等人则密谋利用七海伶刺杀彧修明，计划夺位。白露在调查彧修明的秘密时，被发现但她成功以仰慕彧修明为借口掩饰过去，并借到书带回研究，发现真师的记载，开始怀疑彧修明与真师有关。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵以商人身份接近日军，其实是为了取得特权，以救助更多难民逃离战火。战事恶化，桂婵被义士接至香港，与十七重逢，两人互表心意，但桂婵的记忆力已越来越差……日本开始攻打香港，花香在逃难中早产诞子，留产所其后却被炸毁。桂婵意外听到孩子下落，独自追寻线索，却忘记回家的路，与十七失散。

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: 山河枕

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈、丽雪等仍在丧亲的哀伤中，一妍已经要收起伤悲，面对正向明塱集团猛扑过来的一场狙击风暴！一妍私自拉拢高官莫康尧换取明塱医疗城投标顺利，也尝试拉拢副院长英杰。进涛的四女王启心收到消息，赶到医院，确定进涛已经脑死亡，决定拔喉，却遭一妍阻止！结果事情闹大，消息外泄！

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 白露试图通过送演兵棋试探彧修明对真师的了解。同时，她发现七海伶计划混入星瀚大典刺杀彧修明，尽管白露尝试劝阻，七海伶仍坚持行动。白露求助翼无忧，希望他帮助七海伶逃生。在星瀚大典前夕，彧修明召见白露并试探她对七海伶刺杀计划的了解。白露获得翼无忧提供的凌霄焰火，为即将到来的大典做准备。

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: Germany and Austria
programme.desc: Joanna's emotional exploration begins at the river's source, Germany's Black Forest mountains, ends at the Romanian/Ukrainian border, and marks two key anniversaries. The first is D-Day - the beginning of the end of World War Two and a brief era of freedom.

programme.title: Southern Stingrays
programme.desc: Bad weather causes sea sickness among the team, and their next diving lesson has to be abandoned.

programme.title: Nurse Sharks
programme.desc: It's time to celebrate, as Steve Backshall's team of ten shark saviours have all passed their dive training and are now fully qualified scuba divers.

programme.title: Jaguar
programme.desc: Biologist Patrick Aryee is in Costa Rica to witness the annual mass nesting of sea turtles, as well as the predatory jaguars that come in for the kill.

programme.title: Oman - Al Hajar Mountains
programme.desc: Join Ryan as he explores the most dramatic sections of the Western Al Hajar mountain range which runs west of the Capital Muscat reaching heights of over 3,000 meters, 9,842 feet.

programme.desc: Joanna's emotional exploration begins at the river's source, Germany's Black Forest mountains, ends at the Romanian/Ukrainian border, and marks two key anniversaries. The first is D-Day - the beginning of the end of World War Two and a brief era of freedom.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover why molasses is essentail to producing refined sugar; how the secret to apple danish is the ultimate puff piece; how egg production gets cracking with hi-speed machinery; and how 28,000 perfect tortillas are made each hour.

programme.desc: Discover what a cluster buster is and how it helps to make delicious soup purree; how 240 cans of aerosol whipped cream are produced each minute; why a powerful vacuum is essential to make lollipops; and what paper mills and crab stick production have in common.

programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan tracks and befriends a vast herd of wild horses in Canada.

programme.title: Cyril Chauquet Wild Catch (S1)
programme.desc: Cyril encounters a surfer who survived a bull shark attack; he fishes South Africa's murky waters at sunset, hoping to avoid falling prey to a predator.

programme.title: Into the Unknown
programme.desc: Following early Homo sapiens ancestors as they step out of Africa and venture into the wider world, heading into areas inhabited by other human species.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover why a hot house is essential to growing the sweetest tomatoes; how a 130 foot tunnel oven makes perfect muffins; the secret recipe for Breathsavers™ candy; and how today's machines can make the best gnocchi in only ten minutes!

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover how 32,000 delectably nutritious bagels are made in eight hours; how one company mass produces lip-smackin' airplane food always ready for take off; why berries are essential to make perfecly crunchy Sun Chips.

programme.title: Wild Horses, the Rockies and Me (S1)
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan tracks and befriends a vast herd of wild horses in Canada.

programme.title: 血符门
programme.desc: 中州剑派掌门人江子超与女儿上青，一次路见不平，拔剑救妇，与"血符门"结怨；江氏大徒弟韩更是全家均被"血符门"凶徒所杀，结下深仇。后江氏父女不敌"血符门"凶徒，先后殒命，江氏门下七师妹芳芳，誓与韩合力消灭"血符门"...

programme.title: 花街时代
programme.desc: 少女美丽为谋生来到湾仔酒吧当吧女，自此沦落风尘。其后，美丽在酒吧认识占美，深深爱上他，并确定自己已找到真爱。当占美要离开的时候，伤心的美丽即陷入低潮，直到遇上黑帮头目王英才有了倚靠。

programme.title: 第三类打斗
programme.desc: 全片由"天堂"、"人间"、"地狱" 三个故事组成，带领观众穿梭三个时空。巡宫仙使辛灵，则是贯穿全片的核心人物。他最初因掩护仙界同僚逃出天宫， 而被贬落凡间，在人间因营救逃亡夫妇，不幸重伤身亡，到了地狱又协助冤鬼杀死仇敌。

programme.title: 江湖汉子
programme.desc: 林少游、石大勇及关飞，三者俱属浪迹江湖之豪侠，表面上游戏人间，实则满怀壮志，誓以抗暴为己任。一次，机缘恰巧，林等三人助青年富户楚铁侠逃出险境，并结为生死之交。元朝异族王爷早有霸占富户财富的野心，后更借故追捕楚，林等遂出手相助，共谋抗暴大业...

programme.title: 乾隆下江南
programme.desc: 乾隆为体察民情，撇下侍卫假扮商人微服出访江南，期间得知衙门有贪官欺压百姓，导致民不聊生。这时乾隆遇上一名清廉的卖菜青年，二人合力教训贪官一顿。最后，青年更被获封为皇帝的近身侍卫。

programme.title: 蔡李佛小子
programme.desc: 年青马车夫钟坚因救助少女而与恶霸结怨。马车老板恐惹祸上身，把他辞退。钟坚决志除暴安良，随少林蔡李佛名家习武，向恶势力挑战。最后，他将恶霸除掉，令地方归于平静。

programme.title: 盘丝洞
programme.desc: 本片为邵氏「西游记」系列的第三部作品。唐僧落入了七位蜘蛛精的手中，希望食唐僧肉而得到永生。悟空、八戒和沙僧因此大闹盘丝洞拯救唐僧。

programme.title: 快活林
programme.desc: 武松杀死潘金莲及西门庆后，被判发配孟州牢营。武松元照例要接受一百下杀威棒，但得施恩求情，侥幸获得豁免。武松为报答施恩，当知道她的「快活林」酒家被「蒋门神」蒋忠夺去，誓要不惜一切助她取回酒家。

programme.title: 倩女幽魂
programme.desc: 年轻书生宁采臣在传说闹鬼的恐怖寺庙里过夜。虽然他不相信传闻，却遇上美丽的女鬼聂小倩。原来聂小倩被困在寺庙中，诱使年轻男子给魔头姥姥享用。宁采臣得悉聂小倩为一只善良的女鬼，于是决定助她逃离魔掌。

programme.title: 豪客
programme.desc: 陆虎出狱后，发现自己原来是被阴险的弟弟陆彪所陷害，更夺去家族煤矿生意。妹妹欲阻止陆彪，反被他监禁起来。陆虎救出妹妹后，发现煤矿已被日本帮派所夺，他们誓要打败日本人取回煤矿。

programme.title: 香港73
programme.desc: 1973年，香港股市暴涨人人热衷炒卖股票，小市民因急于入住廉租屋而被不法之徒骗取金钱，及教育制度不健全引起民怨等均被改编成电影中的情节。故事讽刺写实，反映了香港当时的真实面貌！

programme.title: 少林寺
programme.desc: 当时前往少林寺习武者众多，清廷已命令民间不得练武，一直寻找机会将之除掉。少林弟子决定从木人巷闯出寺去抗争，以少林绝学了却了自己的仇恨，但发现清兵已对少林寺展开偷袭行动，于是决意不惜一切要保护少林寺。

programme.title: 鱼美人
programme.desc: 张珍与金宠之女牡丹早有婚约，金宠却欲退婚。张珍偶遇化身金牡丹样子的鲤鱼精，两人渐生情愫。一天，金宠请包公来公断两个真假牡丹，包公为成全二人，推辞此案...

programme.title: 黑鹰
programme.desc: 新加坡的黑鹰组织专与香港保险业作对。私家侦探张世杰从黑鹰领袖陈祖培女儿丽思入手。他俩认识后，不断受到狙击追杀，原来陈祖培于一年前已遭人杀害，胡媚用陈名义发号施令，为非作歹。张世杰与黑鹰集团展开连场激战！

programme.title: 乔太守乱点鸳鸯谱
programme.desc: 孙玉郎与刘慧娘，裴政与徐雅本是两对情投意合的恋人，阴差阳错间，孙玉郎男扮女装代姐拜堂，刘慧娘则代兄娶妻。他们的婚约误配，让成误会，终闹上公堂，乔太守将错就错，干脆来了一个乱点，结果正好有情人终成眷属，皆大欢喜。

programme.title: 无法无天飞车党
programme.desc: 文员郭静中，偕妻子陈美娟、妹嘉莉，乘搭渡轮往离岛渡假。同船而往者，有喜以飞车寻求刺激的「飞车党」；此次前往离岛，所有飞仔都各自带备一部电单车。「飞车党」之首叫尊尼，是个冷酷青年。其弟米高爱闯祸捣乱，亦是「飞车党」之一员。米高在船上见到性感的嘉莉，竟出手调戏......

programme.title: 多情剑客无情剑
programme.desc: 李寻欢是一个风流多情的剑客，却已退出江湖，十年来过着平淡的生活。因梅花盗重现江湖，他重回阔别十年之故园兴云庄。然而，当李寻欢回到兴云庄后，却发现早已物是人非。

programme.title: 断肠剑
programme.desc: 李岳为报父仇暗杀高官后遭通缉，隐姓埋名成为逃犯。他的未婚妻贞儿委托暗恋她的剑客方君兆寻找爱郎，却不知女盗贼小眉早已对李岳暗生情愫。他们错综复杂的爱情四角关系展现出无悔的割舍、付出与无私而伟大的情感。

programme.title: 弟子也疯狂
programme.desc: 方世玉、洪熙官与胡惠干三位俗家弟子初入少林，拜于南院戒嗔大师门下习武。然而，三人常与出家弟子悟清较劲切磋，寺中从此喧嚷不绝，连方丈见此情景亦不免啼笑皆非。

programme.title: 楚留香
programme.desc: 某天，侠盗楚留香欢宴好友无花和尚，神水宫的宫南燕突然来到，指称楚盗去神水宫的天一神水，且用以毒杀多人。在楚留香极力否认下，宫南燕表示他需于一个月内找出真凶，否则必将置其于死地。楚留香为证明自身清白，决意着手调查此事件...

programme.title: 三十年细说从头
programme.desc: 大导演李翰祥改编自己大受欢迎的专栏，尽现电影圈光怪陆离的趣事及传闻，由爱将刘永和戴良纯扮演不同角色，保证令你捧腹大笑。

programme.title: 猎魔者
programme.desc: 巨富之女贺盈聘请罗力到柬埔寨，从杀手乃汶处夺回商业秘密录音带。罗与好友组织一支敢死队，直赴游击队基地，成功将录音带交到贺手上后，方发现背后原来有极大的密秘...

programme.title: 斗气小神仙
programme.desc: 丁安安与雍晴两个表姐妹自小就读于同一所女校，因二人的母亲一向口和心不和，从小就向自己女儿灌输好胜思想，因此形成安安与晴从小斗到大，三日一小吵，五日一大斗。她们在校中认识了男同学米高及保罗，很快成为情侣，两对小冤家后来因斗气竟然互调了男朋友...

programme.title: 射雕英雄传第三集
programme.desc: 郭靖和黄蓉为探寻武穆遗书而前往铁掌山。铁掌帮帮主裘千仞发现二人行踪后，把黄蓉打至重伤，但黄蓉的伤势却只有南帝段智兴才能治好。究竟黄蓉能否及时就医？

programme.title: 猎人
programme.desc: 花花公子周国雄有一本「猎人日记」专门去记录他四出猎艳的故事，周丢弃刘明华，又去追猎吕绮美，刘突然遭人杀死。后来周又去追求女学生朱丽珍...但当晚，吕遭杀死，警方向周追查。同时周想到和他亲近的女人，一个一个的被杀死，嫌凶渐指向他，好像有人在陷害自己。周开始追查真相。

programme.title: 少林子弟
programme.desc: 明末明将吴三桂卖国降清引狼入室，大明江山亦为满清所并，举国有气节之士无不感悲愤。少林子弟纷纷下山，串联各地好汉抗清复明；清官招降纳叛，广收武当、峨嵋派的江湖败类，勾结地方恶霸，向少林子弟赶尽杀绝，洪、方、胡等处在重重危机险恶之中...

programme.title: 军阀趣史
programme.desc: 此片可谓李翰祥导演，经典作《大军阀》之延续，焦点在几位当时得令的艳星，余莎莉、邵音音及楚湘云。片中「艳趣」特别多...

programme.title: Today's Close-Up
programme.desc: Are you always tired and struggle to sleep? You may be suffering from under-nutrition. The condition even affects people who believe they eat balanced meals. We look at the causes and fixes.

programme.title: Document 72 Hours
programme.desc: On Tsushima Island in southwestern Japan, a small store stocks fresh produce and everyday items and delivers to homes, restaurants, schools and more. Join us for three days on the island.

programme.title: Activate Your Japanese!

programme.title: Dig More Japan!

programme.desc: Tokyo Skytree, one of Japan's most famous tourist attractions, is equipped with a variety of countermeasures against disasters - we go behind the scenes to explore the tower's advanced technologies.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Inoue Hiroko is the president of an NGO that has been running exchange programmes for young people from Israel, Palestine and Japan for 20 years - she talks about their goals and her hope for peace.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: Riverside Sawmill: Workers at a sawmill use the latest tools and honed skills to prepare the building blocks of Edo life; long, narrow beams, bamboo stems, and leftover wood stacked high as buildings.

programme.title: Shutter Island
programme.desc: Up-and-coming U.S. marshal Teddy Daniels is assigned to investigate the disappearance of a patient from Boston's Shutter Island Ashecliffe Hospital.

programme.title: Land Of Gold
programme.desc: A truck driver finds a young Mexican American girl inside his shipping container and his life takes a turn as he tries to reunite her with her family.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Matt Damon reprises his most iconic role in the latest chapter of the Bourne franchise.

programme.title: Blood Diamond
programme.desc: A smuggler, fisherman and reporter team up in search of a priceless pink diamond, a lost son and the dark story behind the diamond trade.

programme.title: Smallfoot
programme.desc: The Bigfoot legend is turned upside down when a bright young Yeti finds something he thought didn't exist-a human.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1

programme.title: Day 1 Session 1
programme.desc: The Badminton Asia Championships is a tournament organized by governing body Badminton Asia to crown the best badminton players in Asia. It features competitions to determine the top badminton athletes across Asia in men's singles, women's singles, men's doubles, women's doubles, and mixed doubles.

programme.title: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) Final
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. As the oldest indoor women's tournament in Europe, it is a key WTA 500 event renowned for attracting top-tier players, played on indoor clay courts and noted for awarding the singles champion a Porsche sports car.

programme.title: 1st Round Qualifiers H/Ls Show
programme.desc: Catch all the triumphant moments from the 13 winning teams who are through to the second round of qualifiers.

programme.title: BMW Open by BitPanda (500) SF 1
programme.desc: The Bavarian International Tennis Championships is an annual, professional men's tennis tournament played on outdoor red clay courts in Munich, Germany, at the MTTC Iphitos complex. Founded in 1899, it has been sponsored by BMW since 1990 and the tournament is known for its intimate atmosphere in the heart of Munich.

programme.title: BMW Open by BitPanda (500) SF 2
programme.desc: The Bavarian International Tennis Championships is an annual, professional men's tennis tournament played on outdoor red clay courts in Munich, Germany, at the MTTC Iphitos complex. Founded in 1899, it has been sponsored by BMW since 1990 and the tournament is known for its intimate atmosphere in the heart of Munich.

programme.title: BMW Open by BitPanda (500) Final
programme.desc: The Bavarian International Tennis Championships is an annual, professional men's tennis tournament played on outdoor red clay courts in Munich, Germany, at the MTTC Iphitos complex. Founded in 1899, it has been sponsored by BMW since 1990 and the tournament is known for its intimate atmosphere in the heart of Munich.

programme.title: Preview Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Semi-Finals & Finals
programme.desc: The 2026 European Badminton Championships is the 32nd edition of the continental championship and will be held in Huelva, Spain. The tournament is used to determine the European champion in all five categories (Men’s Singles/Doubles, Women’s Singles/Doubles, Mixed Doubles).

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍将王家私人飞机坠毁的消息压下；王家三女王启澄与其丈夫彭建邦，暗通进涛的死敌柯永成，要令明塱医院停摆。以珈与丽雪质问下，一妍终讲出所知；一妍答应让两人到当地参与搜救，她则留港善后，但一切要保密……一妍安排专机让坠机生还者进涛回港就医，越洋吩咐副院长林英杰紧急安排，同时暗中跟记者交易……

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 白露去见七海伶，得知七海伶等人计划刺杀彧修明。同时，白露被任命为负责星瀚大典的事宜，并举荐顾惘然协助。另一方面，界诸婴在父亲界海天的遗书劝导下，放下仇恨。蔡骖和樊如晦等人则密谋利用七海伶刺杀彧修明，计划夺位。白露在调查彧修明的秘密时，被发现但她成功以仰慕彧修明为借口掩饰过去，并借到书带回研究，发现真师的记载，开始怀疑彧修明与真师有关。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵以商人身份接近日军，其实是为了取得特权，以救助更多难民逃离战火。战事恶化，桂婵被义士接至香港，与十七重逢，两人互表心意，但桂婵的记忆力已越来越差……日本开始攻打香港，花香在逃难中早产诞子，留产所其后却被炸毁。桂婵意外听到孩子下落，独自追寻线索，却忘记回家的路，与十七失散。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈、丽雪等仍在丧亲的哀伤中，一妍已经要收起伤悲，面对正向明塱集团猛扑过来的一场狙击风暴！一妍私自拉拢高官莫康尧换取明塱医疗城投标顺利，也尝试拉拢副院长英杰。进涛的四女王启心收到消息，赶到医院，确定进涛已经脑死亡，决定拔喉，却遭一妍阻止！结果事情闹大，消息外泄！

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 白露试图通过送演兵棋试探彧修明对真师的了解。同时，她发现七海伶计划混入星瀚大典刺杀彧修明，尽管白露尝试劝阻，七海伶仍坚持行动。白露求助翼无忧，希望他帮助七海伶逃生。在星瀚大典前夕，彧修明召见白露并试探她对七海伶刺杀计划的了解。白露获得翼无忧提供的凌霄焰火，为即将到来的大典做准备。

programme.title: Crazy Fofo
programme.desc: Crazy Fofo and his friends go out into the bush and kill an ox that had escaped. The friends share the meat without giving any to Fofo. So he denounces them to the owner of the ox.

programme.title: Washing-up
programme.desc: In priestesses' camp, Pokou wakes up in a very bad mood. She asks a Komian what challenges she has to carry out, but the latter simply makes fun of her and asks her to wash the dishes.

programme.title: The satchel
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Let's play with the sisters
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: The white shark (part 1)
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: The white shark (part 2)
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Agricultrices
programme.desc: Florence, Aline and Lydie are farmers. Each in her own way has chosen to enter a struggling sector: organic vegetable growing, goat farming and viticulture. Will these three young women manage to meet the challenges and fulfil their dreams in a world still largely dominated by men? Interwoven portraits.

programme.title: Montreal Sauvage
programme.desc: In the south of the province of Quebec is the island of Montreal, population 2 million. Here, in the last remaining wild corners of the city, rare and little-known animals hide: the mottled owl, the coyote, the least bittern, the longnose gar... This is a close-up look at discreet fauna trying to defend their place among humans.

programme.title: Boussay
programme.desc: An old medieval fortress built at the time of the Crusades, the Chateau de Boussay became a Renaissance residence and later a farm.

programme.title: Quebec, a journey to share
programme.desc: Accompanied by photographer and director Alexis Lopez, Ismael Khelifa explores western Quebec and its forests, which take on vibrant colors during the Indian summer. Traveling through different regions along the routes once taken by Champlain and other explorers, he meets today's adventurers and builders...

programme.title: One Step Too Many
programme.desc: Mac and Charlie score a key witness in their attempt to corroborate Dantana’s Operation Genoa story.

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: When Iris realizes that she is an AI companion for her boyfriend, she must embrace who she is and fight to survive in a battle for ultimate control.

programme.title: Becoming Mike Nichols
programme.desc: The renowned director opens up to his close friend and colleague, Jack O'Brien, in his historic, final filmed appearance.

programme.title: Game Change
programme.desc: Adapted from the non-fiction book of the same name, this HBO Original Movie provides an insider's look at the 2008 US presidential election.

programme.title: Red Team Iii
programme.desc: Rebecca pieces together the staff’s fateful decision to air Dantana’s special report on Operation Genoa.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: The story before Snow White: During the war between two queens, the huntsman must vanquish the evil queen before her wickedness rules for eternity.

programme.title: Episode 7
programme.desc: A comedy set on a college campus centering on an author's (Steve Carell) complicated relationship with his daughter (Charly Clive).

programme.title: Episode 5
programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.title: Bury My Heart At Wounded Knee
programme.desc: An HBO Original film which explores the impact after the US government wages a campaign to exterminate American Indians.

programme.title: Imagine That
programme.desc: When a successful executive suffers a crisis of confidence and his career is at stake, he finds the solution to his problems in his daughter’s imaginary world.

programme.title: Ángel Rodríguez
programme.desc: An HBO Original Movie, Angel Rodriguez tells the tale of Nicole, a social worker, and her relationship with Angel, a bright but troubled inner-city teen.

programme.title: Foster
programme.desc: The documentary film upends some of the most enduring myths about foster care, offering a realistic but hopeful perspective on a community that needs society’s support.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: A shy, small-town boy becomes one of the most iconic figures in rock & roll we all know as Elton John.

programme.title: Keanu
programme.desc: Two cousins attempt to infiltrate a street gang to retrieve their purloined pet, only to start a gang war that forces them to take the law into their own hands.
